title: KISS transport tests miss spec-mandated behaviors
description: lichen/tests/kiss_transport/src/main.c: no coverage for SetHardware response format (would have caught the P0 MSB bug), malformed/oversized-frame resync, pre-FEND garbage rejection, Return/TxTail/FullDuplex accept-but-ignore (§4.3), unknown command types 7-14 (§1.5), inter-frame FEND fill (§1.1). Existing encode/decode tests do use hardcoded byte expectations (independent oracle — good); these are coverage gaps.
